name: Reconcile interaction-durability Layer 3: confirm SUBJECT-09 closed + remove orphaned draft_status enum/failure_code
description: Audit (ADR-register §6 AUDIT-A) found the interaction-durability Layer 3 root fix (Inngest interview-persist-curriculum, app/interview.ready_to_persist, completing/failed draft-state flow) is NOT in code, and routes/interview.ts was deleted entirely when the interview screen was removed. However migration 0046 shipped the completing/failed draft_status enum values + failure_code column, which are now wired-but-unused. Spec A5 (COALESCE-sentinel topic index) and 3b (extractSignals returns topics) are also factually wrong vs code (bookId is NOT NULL; extractSignals returns {goals,experienceLevel,currentKnowledge,interests}); the existing 0043 index (book_id, lower(title)) is what shipped.
acceptanceCriteria: 1) Confirm SUBJECT-09 (lost-curriculum-on-persist-failure) is genuinely closed by the interview-deletion / per-topic async extraction path (ONB-P2). 2) Either remove the orphan draft_status 'completing'/'failed' enum values + failure_code column, or document why they remain. 3) Mark interaction-durability L3 + interview-side L2 as superseded in docs.
riskImpact: Wired-but-untriggered schema creates false confidence that SUBJECT-09's durable-persist path exists when it does not. CLAUDE.md: 'wired-but-untriggered code is worse than dead code'.
